title: artemisia gmelinii var. gmelinii
intro: Artemisia gmelinii var. gmelinii, also known as Gmelin's wormwood or Russian wormwood, is a plant species in the daisy family, native to East Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to repel insects and its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant has been used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems, respiratory issues, and skin conditions, due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. In herbal preparations, Artemisia gmelinii var. gmelinii is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote digestive health and reduce inflammation.
